description: 动词+介词/副词构成的固定搭配。含义常不同于原动词。
examples_json: [{"en":"'Give up' is a common phrasal verb meaning to stop trying.","zh":"give up是一个常见动词短语，意思是放弃。"}]

description: 停止尝试/放弃。后接名词或动名词。
examples_json: [{"en":"Don't give up even if it's difficult.","zh":"即使困难也不要放弃。"}]

description: 寻找某物/某人。比search更口语化。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm looking for my keys.","zh":"我在找我的钥匙。"}]

description: 用完/耗尽某物。
examples_json: [{"en":"We've run out of milk.","zh":"我们牛奶喝完了。"}]

description: 想出(主意/方案)。
examples_json: [{"en":"I came up with a great idea.","zh":"我想出了一个好主意。"}]

description: 容忍/忍受。常用于负面语境。
examples_json: [{"en":"I can't put up with the noise anymore.","zh":"我再也受不了那噪音了。"}]

description: 与某人相处融洽。
examples_json: [{"en":"I get along well with my colleagues.","zh":"我和同事们相处得很好。"}]

description: 表示习惯、事实、常态。I eat breakfast at 8.。
examples_json: [{"en":"I go to work by bus every day.","zh":"我每天乘公交上班。"}]

description: 表示正在进行的动作或当前阶段的安排。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm currently working on a new project.","zh":"我目前正在做一个新项目。"}]

description: 表示过去发生但与现在相关的动作。已有经验或持续到现在。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have already finished my homework.","zh":"我已经完成了作业。"}]

description: 表示过去某个时间发生的动作或状态。常与yesterday/last week连用。
examples_json: [{"en":"I visited Paris last summer.","zh":"我去年夏天去了巴黎。"}]

description: 表示过去某时正在进行的动作。常用于背景描述。
examples_json: [{"en":"I was reading when she called.","zh":"她打电话时我正在看书。"}]

description: 表示转折。比but更正式。用于句首或句中。
examples_json: [{"en":"The task was difficult. However, I managed to finish it.","zh":"任务很困难，然而我设法完成了。"}]

description: 表示因果。用于正式衔接。比so更书面化。
examples_json: [{"en":"I was late. Therefore, I missed the first part of the meeting.","zh":"我迟到了，因此错过了会议第一部分。"}]

description: 引导让步状语从句。although + 从句 + 主句。
examples_json: [{"en":"Although it was raining, we went for a walk.","zh":"虽然下着雨，我们还是去散步了。"}]

description: 用who/which/that修饰名词的从句，提供更多信息。
examples_json: [{"en":"The book that I borrowed was very interesting.","zh":"我借的那本书很有趣。"}]

description: 频率副词。100%频率。always/usually/often/sometimes/rarely/never。
examples_json: [{"en":"I always have coffee in the morning.","zh":"我早上总是喝咖啡。"}]

description: 程度副词。比very弱，比fairly强。quite good / quite interesting。
examples_json: [{"en":"The movie was quite good.","zh":"这部电影相当不错。"}]

description: 方式副词。描述动作的方式。常放在动词后。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please read the instructions carefully.","zh":"请仔细阅读说明。"}]

description: 评论副词。放在句首修饰整个句子，表达说话人的态度。
examples_json: [{"en":"Luckily, nobody was hurt in the accident.","zh":"幸运的是，事故中没有人受伤。"}]

description: 用于具体日期、星期、节日(带day)。on Monday / on June 5th。
examples_json: [{"en":"The meeting is on Friday.","zh":"会议在周五。"}]

description: 用于月份、年份、季节、一天中的部分。in March / in 2024。
examples_json: [{"en":"I was born in July.","zh":"我出生在七月。"}]

description: 用于钟表时间、节日(不带day)。at 5pm / at night。
examples_json: [{"en":"The class starts at 9 AM.","zh":"课程上午9点开始。"}]

description: 表示两个动作同时发生。while + 进行时从句。
examples_json: [{"en":"While I was cooking, the phone rang.","zh":"我在做饭时电话响了。"}]

description: 表示主句动作发生在从句之前。
examples_json: [{"en":"Before I left, I checked the weather.","zh":"我离开前查了天气。"}]

description: 表示主句动作发生在从句之后。
examples_json: [{"en":"After I finished work, I went to the gym.","zh":"我下班后去了健身房。"}]

description: 表示在某空间内部。in the room / in the box。
examples_json: [{"en":"The book is in my bag.","zh":"书在我的包里。"}]

description: 表示在某物表面。on the table / on the wall。
examples_json: [{"en":"The keys are on the table.","zh":"钥匙在桌子上。"}]

description: 表示紧邻某物/某人。
examples_json: [{"en":"The bank is next to the supermarket.","zh":"银行在超市旁边。"}]

description: 表示在街道/房间的另一侧。
examples_json: [{"en":"The café is opposite the station.","zh":"咖啡馆在车站对面。"}]

description: 表示在两者之间。
examples_json: [{"en":"The pharmacy is between the bank and the post office.","zh":"药房在银行和邮局之间。"}]

description: 指路时的基本指令。
examples_json: [{"en":"Go straight until you see the traffic light.","zh":"直走直到看到红绿灯。"}]
